content: NordStar Industrials Inc. is a synthetic, illustrative industrials issuer used to demonstrate credit-rating reconciliation. Its Q3 10-Q, filed 2025-11-05, reports meaningful deleveraging versus the prior quarter: net debt was reduced and EBITDA recovered, lowering the Debt/EBITDA leverage ratio and improving interest coverage. This filing date is the as-of boundary that provider-input freshness is measured against: a provider whose rating action predates 2025-11-05 has not yet reflected the improved Q3 fundamentals. NordStar is the anchor case for the stale-input divergence.
disclaimer: Synthetic, illustrative issuer — fictional entity, not a real SEC filer.
